title: storage: add new pkg/configfile package
body:
Unify the config file loading logic with this new package. See the full design doc[1] for more information.

[1] https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/1af4caf888924e837e9c6038c30d67bfcc7c0196/contrib/design-docs/config-file-parsing.md

<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body: This is the initial version of the package, I should it should cover almost all of what we need. Though I guess I only know once I start porting all the config files.

Ok changes since last push

- iterator returns a struct Item with an io.Reader and name field and we take care of closing the file not the caller
- I noticed a order issue while porting containers.conf, `_OVERRIDE` env is now read AFTER the modules being loaded. Also when the main env name (i.e. `CONTAINERS_CONF`) is used we still must load modules and the  ` _OVERRIDE` env.
I make a second PR with the containers.conf changes which should make the diff much more equal as it shows how much code it removes there.
(repushed again as I forget to add the doc.go file)
Fixed the docs nits (and removed the outdated sentence which said the caller must close the file). This should be good to go now.
